prompt: Order these archaeological discoveries from earliest to latest

events.title: Tutankhamun tomb found
events.fact: 1922 — Howard Carter finds intact royal tomb

events.title: Dead Sea Scrolls found
events.fact: 1947 — ancient Hebrew manuscripts found in Qumran

events.title: Terracotta Army found
events.fact: 1974 — farmers dig well and find clay army

events.title: Ötzi the Iceman found
events.fact: 1991 — natural mummy discovered in Ötztal Alps
